# usePreferredContrast

Reactive prefers-contrast media query.

**Package:** `@vueuse/core`
**Category:** Browser

## Usage

```ts
import { usePreferredContrast } from '@vueuse/core'

const preferredContrast = usePreferredContrast()
```

## Reference

[VueUse Docs](https://vueuse.org/core/usePreferredContrast/)
